revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月三十]][[zh:四月三十]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 30|qq=April 30}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 30''' is the 30th day of the month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. As with all other day 30s of the Sino-Japanese calendar, this occurrence sometimes happens and sometimes does not, depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> == Events == * {{ill|Bunji (era)|en|Bunji (era)|qid=Q1194415|lt=Bunchi|1=Bunji (era)}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} 1189 {{ill|June 15|en|June 15|qid=Q2613|lt=June 15|1=June 15}}) – {{ill|Korikawa Battle|ja|衣川合戦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Korikawa Battle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135492573|1=Battle of Koromo River}}. {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|en|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|qid=Q310445|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitsune|1=Minamoto no Yoshitsune}} was ordered to be captured, so {{ill|Fujiwara no Yasuhira|en|Fujiwara no Yasuhira|qid=Q3090682|lt=Fujiwara Taisuke|1=Fujiwara no Yasuhira}} attacked the Korikawa mansion; Minamoto no Yoshitsune later committed suicide (leap April). * {{ill|Genkō (1321–1324)|en|Genkō (1321–1324)|qid=Q509889|lt=Genki|1=Genkō (1321–1324)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} 1570 {{ill|June 3|en|June 3|qid=Q2623|lt=June 3|1=June 3}}) – During the subjugation of Echizen, {{ill|Asakura Yoshikage|en|Asakura Yoshikage|qid=Q1322768|lt=Asakura Yoshikage|1=Asakura Yoshikage}} and {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|qid=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} withdrew from Echizen due to the rebellion of {{ill|Azai Nagamasa|en|Azai Nagamasa|qid=Q1142446|lt=Asai Nagamasa|1=Azai Nagamasa}} in Ōmi. == Births == == Deaths == * {{ill|Bunji (era)|en|Bunji (era)|qid=Q1194415|lt=Bunchi|1=Bunji (era)}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} 1189, May 17) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|en|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|qid=Q310445|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitsune|1=Minamoto no Yoshitsune}}, a {{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}} (born {{ill|1159|en|1159|qid=Q19659|lt=1159|1=1159}}). * {{ill|Enbun|en|Enbun|qid=Q1145071|lt=Enbun|1=Enbun}} 3rd year / {{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|qid=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei|1=Zhengping}} 13th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} 1358 {{ill|June 7|en|June 7|qid=Q2616|lt=June 7|1=June 7}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|en|Ashikaga Takauji|qid=Q297107|lt=Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji}}, the first {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|ja|足利幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 室町幕府|1=Ashikaga shogunate|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1154406}} (born {{ill|1305|en|1305|qid=Q5624|lt=1305|1=1305}}). * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} 1630 {{ill|June 10|en|June 10|qid=Q2615|lt=June 10|1=June 10}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobukatsu|en|Oda Nobukatsu|qid=Q3044815|lt=Oda Nobukatsu|1=Oda Nobukatsu}}, a {{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}} and the second son of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|qid=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} (born {{ill|1558|en|1558|qid=Q6601|lt=1558|1=1558}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} 1716 {{ill|June 19|en|June 19|qid=Q2669|lt=June 19|1=June 19}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsugu|en|Tokugawa Ietsugu|qid=Q366722|lt=Tokugawa Ietsugu|1=Tokugawa Ietsugu}} of the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}}, the 7th shōgun (born {{ill|1709|en|1709|qid=Q6857|lt=1709|1=1709}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|29|5|1|3|30|5|4|0430|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
